---
id: deactivate-instrument
title: "Deactivate an instrument"
description: "Marks an instrument as INACTIVE (logical delete). The instrument remains queryable for historical data."
sidebar_label: "Deactivate an instrument"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Deactivate an instrument"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/api/v1/instruments/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Marks an instrument as INACTIVE (logical delete). The instrument remains queryable for historical data.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
